description: Deterministic strata and task definitions for Phase B benchmark generation.

required_strata.name: async_entities
required_strata.description: Async functions/methods that drive auth flows.
required_strata.task_query: authenticate users through async dependency and manager flows

required_strata.name: empty_exception_classes
required_strata.description: Exception-like classes with sparse bodies where inheritance and semantic tags carry meaning.
required_strata.task_query: handle user-not-found and token-invalid error conditions

required_strata.name: wrapper_style_methods
required_strata.description: Facade methods that delegate to router factories.
required_strata.task_query: find facade methods that return router objects

required_strata.name: inheritance_heavy_classes
required_strata.description: Classes whose behavior depends heavily on base strategy contracts.
required_strata.task_query: identify authentication strategy classes implementing token lifecycle

required_strata.name: high_call_entities
required_strata.description: Entities with dense call/reference signatures and orchestration behavior.
required_strata.task_query: find orchestration-heavy entities coordinating auth and persistence

supplemental_tasks.query: authenticate a user and opportunistically upgrade password hash
issue a signed JWT token for verify and reset flows
decode and validate a JWT payload from an incoming token
route for requesting an email verification token
verify-email path that marks a user verified after token checks
forgot-password endpoint that initiates reset token generation
reset-password endpoint that applies a new password from token claims
backend login flow that writes strategy token and returns transport response
backend logout flow that revokes token and returns logout transport response
strategies that actually revoke persisted tokens rather than raising not-supported
supplemental_tasks.note: JWT destroy_token is an obvious but wrong answer; this task should pressure L0 expansion.

supplemental_tasks.query: parse UUID user ids with proper invalid-id handling
parse integer user ids with proper invalid-id handling
oauth callback path that creates user records when account/email are new
oauth associate callback path that links provider account to current user
component that signals transport logout is unsupported instead of deleting persisted tokens
supplemental_tasks.note: Distinguishes transport-level logout semantics from strategy-level token revocation.

supplemental_tasks.query: cookie transport login response that sets authentication cookie
cookie transport logout response that clears authentication cookie
users router endpoints for self-profile retrieval and update
FastAPIUsers facade method delegating users router construction
supplemental_tasks.note: Facade and factory have similar names; naive single-hop matching tends to miss one side.
